alt: Hoatzin actively feeding on lush green tree leaves in Colombia
caption: As strict folivores, their diet consists almost entirely of tough green leaves, which they digest via foregut fermentation like a cow.
acquisitionNotes: Action shot showing native leaf-eating dietary behavior in trees. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/13/El_hoacin_%28Opisthocomus_hoazin%29.jpg
attributionText: Photo by SIHYTA COL via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 4.0
